title: Rotten Food
description: "Rotten Food" is a funny Minecraft resource pack that reverses food textures—turning fresh items like apples and steak into rotten, moldy versions while making rotten flesh look delicious. Perfect for pranks or chaotic gameplay!
body:
Tired of the same old boring food in Minecraft? "Rotten Food" flips the script by turning fresh food into rotten waste—and magically making rotten flesh look delicious!

🍎 Fresh to Foul – Apples, bread, steak, and more now appear moldy, spoiled, or downright inedible.
🍖 Rotten to Righteous – That gross zombie flesh? Now it looks like a juicy, perfectly cooked steak!
🤢 A Hilarious Prank – Trick your friends into thinking they're eating garbage... while rotten flesh is the real gourmet treat!

Perfect for chaos-loving players, pranksters, or anyone who wants a bizarre twist on survival!

Warning: May cause extreme confusion—and laughter!

Download now and experience Minecraft cuisine... backwards! 🍽️↩️🗑️
